message:
fix: Handle strings inside f-string format specs

The format spec parsing in f-strings wasn't tracking string literals,
causing braces inside strings like `{"{"` to be counted incorrectly.
This caused parsing errors for f-strings like `f'{2:{"{"}>10}'`.

Added string tracking (single, double, and triple-quoted) to the
format spec parsing loop, matching the behavior of the main
expression parsing loop.

Fixes test_fstring.py parsing errors.
